zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree於1503年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，他的父親Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale33歲，母親Lady Margaret Kennedy31歲。他和Margaret Hamilton至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1549年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾奧爾崔享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree于1503年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，他的父亲Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale33岁，母亲Lady Margaret Kennedy31岁。他和Margaret Hamilton至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1549年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾奧爾崔享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree was born in 1503, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, was 33 and his mother, Lady Margaret Kennedy, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Hamilton. He died in 1549, in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree est né en 1503, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Kennedy, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Hamilton. Il est décédé en 1549, à Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree 1503 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale 33 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Kennedy 31. Er hatte mit Margaret Hamilton mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1549 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree è nato il nel 1503 nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Kennedy, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Hamilton. Morì nel 1549, nel Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltreeが1503年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで生まれた時，父Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondaleは33歳，母Lady Margaret Kennedyは31歳であった。彼はMargaret Hamiltonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1549年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアオチルトレで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree(이)가 1503년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Kennedy(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Margaret Hamilton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 오치트리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree nasceu em 1503, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Kennedy, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Hamilton. Ele faleceu em 1549, em Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree родился в 1503 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Kennedy, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Hamilton. Он умер в 1549 г. в местности очилтри, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord of Ochiltree nació en 1503, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Kennedy, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Hamilton. Murió en 1549, en Ochiltree, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
